taskDescription: Complete the crossword on Meninges and CSF

words.clue: Outermost meningeal layer, thick and tough
Middle meningeal layer, thin and avascular
Innermost meningeal layer adherent to brain surface
Dural fold separating the two cerebral hemispheres
Tent-shaped dural fold separating cerebrum from cerebellum
Tufted projections of arachnoid into the superior sagittal sinus for CSF absorption
Excess CSF accumulation causing raised intracranial pressure
Cistern located between cerebellum and medulla
S-shaped dural venous sinus continuing as internal jugular vein
Lumbar puncture is performed at this vertebral interspace (L3-L__)
